overview: Functional medicine clinic that identifies and treats root causes of chronic health issues through comprehensive lab testing and personalized treatment protocols. Care is delivered through an 8-12 month intensive program coordinated by a team including a doctor, practitioners, nutritionist, and health coach.
highlights: Comprehensive lab testing at cellular level
Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy and infrared sauna
targetAudience: People with chronic health conditions seeking functional medicine approaches to address root causes.
